text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and was published at ECCV 2022 by Jinxing Zhou et al., with its official title being "Audio-Visual Segmentation" (not "Avsbench: Audio-visual segmentation dataset"). The AVSBench name refers to the dataset introduced in the paper, not the paper's title itself — this is a minor title variant/informal reference, not a fabrication. The authors match exactly.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.05042
